name: loop-skills
description: Research-driven planning, debugging, and audit loops adapted for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Research, plan, debug, and verify with Codex
interface.longDescription: Codex-native engineering loops that combine repository evidence, current research, bounded subagents, human gates, TDD, and adversarial verification.
defaultPrompt: Use loop-plan to research and plan this feature.
Use loop-debug to reproduce and fix this bug.
Use loop-audit to inspect this agent workflow.
